subject:
Re: WarpTools ts_export_particles failes with half of the tilt
 series
body:
I checked the logs, and it seems these tilt series are just skipped; there 
is no error, no reason printed.

>
> Cheers,

> Alister

> Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
